name: io.github.rajeswaran140/crowvault
description: 327 AI-powered developer tools via REST API and native MCP protocol. Generate production-ready Dockerfiles, K8s manifests, database schemas, API endpoints, Terraform modules, test suites, and more — across 9 specialized servers.

environmentVariables.description: CrowVault API key (starts with cv_). Get one free at https://crowvault.ai/dashboard
environmentVariables.name: CROWVAULT_API_KEY

tools.name: generate_dockerfile
tools.description: Generate optimized multi-stage Dockerfile for any stack

tools.name: design_schema
tools.description: Design a database schema with DDD aggregate mapping

tools.name: generate_helm_chart
tools.description: Generate Helm chart for Kubernetes deployment

tools.name: generate_api_endpoint
tools.description: Generate REST API endpoint with validation and OpenAPI docs

tools.name: generate_terraform_module
tools.description: Generate Terraform module for cloud infrastructure

tools.name: generate_jest_test
tools.description: Generate Jest test suite for any function or module

tools.name: generate_react_component
tools.description: Generate React component with hooks and styling

tools.name: generate_cloud_run_service
tools.description: Generate GCP Cloud Run service configuration
